hooks.command: /bin/sh -c 'for f in "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}"/plugins/cache/*/attune/*/hooks/session-start-communication.mjs; do p="$f"; done; exec "$p" --platform codex'
/bin/sh -c 'for f in "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}"/plugins/cache/*/attune/*/hooks/session-start-verification.mjs; do p="$f"; done; exec "$p" --platform codex'
/bin/sh -c 'for f in "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}"/plugins/cache/*/attune/*/hooks/session-start-writing.mjs; do p="$f"; done; exec "$p" --platform codex'
